string.text:
An American-made AR-15-style rifle made to be compatible with 7.62mm AK magazines. The rifle has a high degree of compatibility with AR-15 parts and can typically accept the same attachments.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Central Missouri Machine Guns
